name: Documentation
about: Report documentation issues or suggest improvements
title: '[Docs]: '
labels: documentation

---

## Documentation Issue

### Type of Issue

- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Missing documentation
- [ ] Unclear explanation
- [ ] Broken links
- [ ] Typo or grammar
- [ ] Other

### Location

Where is this documentation issue?

- **Page URL or Path**: [e.g., /docs/getting-started/quick-start]
- **Section**: [e.g., Installation steps]

### Description

Describe the issue with the documentation.

### Suggested Improvement

If you have a suggestion for how to improve the documentation, please describe it here.

### Additional Context

Add any other context about the documentation issue here.
